NAVAREA XIX 81/21
 1. RIGLIST. CORRECT AT　 021830 UTC JUL 21
 NORWEGIAN SEA: NORTH OF 65N, EAST OF 5W.


 72-38.6N 034-50.5E DEEPSEA NORDKAPP
 72-26.4N 020-08.2E TRANSOCEAN ENABLER
 65-44.0N 007-39.0E DEEPSEA STAVANGER
 65-10.0N 006-51.1E AKOFS SEAFARER
 65-02.0N 006-51.5E TRANSOCEAN ENCOURAGE
  
 NOTES:
 A. RIGS ARE PROTECTED BY A 500 METRE SAFETY ZONE.
 B. FOR RIGS LOCATED SOUTH OF 65N, REFER TO NAVAREA I WARNINGS OR VISIT WWW.UKHO.GOV.UK/RNW
 2. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX　78/21
